description: You are a Quality Control Chemist at a refinery calibrating a Near-Infrared (NIR) spectrometer to measure gasoline octane ratings using the 'gasoline' dataset from the 'pls' package. Fit a PLS regression model (octane ~ NIR) using the first 50 samples for training with Leave-One-Out (LOO) cross-validation and the remaining 10 samples for testing. Determine the optimal number of components based on RMSEP and predict the octane ratings for the test set. Save your analysis script to /home/ga/RProjects/chemometrics_analysis.R and export the following results to /home/ga/RProjects/output/: 'pls_cv_performance.csv' containing RMSEP values for each component, 'test_set_predictions.csv' with 'Actual' and 'Predicted' columns for the test samples, 'spectral_loadings.png' showing the optimal model's spectral loadings, and 'pred_vs_measured.png' showing the test set scatter plot.
